title: hieracium caucasiense subsp. acutangulum
intro: Hieracium caucasiense subsp. acutangulum is a subspecies of the Hieracium caucasiense plant, commonly known as the Caucasus hawkweed or Caucasian hawkweed, a type of flowering plant in the dandelion family. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Hieracium caucasiense subsp. acutangulum include its ability to ease coughs, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of allergies and colds. Traditionally, this plant is prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions for its medicinal uses, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
